prompt: Create a richly detailed vertical fantasy anime illustration of a young girl sitting in the lower left of a colossal circular library tower, reading an ornate dark green book. The viewpoint is a dramatic ultra-wide fisheye perspective from near floor level looking upward through the hollow cylindrical interior toward a round open skylight filled with vivid blue sky and fluffy white clouds. The library walls curve around the entire image and are packed with thousands of books, gilded shelves, ladders, balconies, framed paintings, glowing lamps, vines, and intricate brass-and-wood architectural details. Warm golden sunlight streams down from above, mixing with amber library lamp light and soft blue sky light. The girl has long wavy dark brown hair, a delicate thoughtful expression, and wears a loose white blouse with a long dark navy skirt decorated with gold star embroidery; she sits beside glass lanterns and stacked books. A floating spiral staircase of dark wooden planks rises from the lower center toward the right side, where a sleek black cat stands on one step with its tail raised. Add exactly 22 visible birds flying through the library and skylight: 1 large blue bird cropped at the left edge, 1 yellow bird near the lower left shelves, 2 red birds on the upper left, 1 red bird near the top center, 1 blue bird near the center sky, 1 pink bird near the middle, 1 black bird near the center-left, 1 pale golden bird glowing at the right, 1 blue bird on the upper right, 2 red birds on the right side, and 10 tiny distant birds silhouetted or colored against the sky. Use a magical, painterly, high-detail style with cinematic lighting, ornate fantasy architecture, luminous dust motes, deep perspective, vibrant GPT-like teal-blue and warm gold color grading, and a small gold cursive artist signature in the bottom left. No modern objects, no text labels, no borders.
